stem: A program should take a username entered by the user and print the first three characters, followed by the length of the whole username.
model_answer:
OCR pseudocode:
  username = input("Enter username: ")
  first_three = username.substring(0, 3)
  print(first_three)
  print(username.length)

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Write code (pseudocode or a high-level language) to achieve this.

mark_points.text: reads the username from input and stores it in a variable
accepted_alternatives: uses input() to get the username

mark_points.text: extracts the first three characters using substring/slice (e.g. username.substring(0,3) or username[0:3])
prints the first three characters and the length of the username (e.g. username.length or len(username))
accepted_alternatives: outputs first 3 chars and length of full string
